results.title: Dubai brings back 4-day work week for govt staff this summer; Fridays off for many employees
results.description: Dubai brings back 4-day work week Thousands of Dubai government employees will enjoy more flexibility at work this summer, with some eligible for a three-day weekend under the emirate’s renewed “Our Flexible Summer” initiative starting June 29.The programme, launched by the Dubai Government Human Resources Department (DGHR), will run until September 10 and introduces reduced [...] The post Dubai brings back 4-day work week for govt staff this summer; Fridays off for many employees appeared first on News7tv .

results.title: BUDI MADANI portal gets 13,000 new applications for diesel aid
results.description: The Budi Madani portal receives over 13,000 new applications for an extra 100 litres of subsidised diesel for eligible private pick-up truck and jeep owners.

results.title: Nifty faces resistance at 24,500, Sensex eyes 79,000 if rally sustains: Analysts
results.description: Mumbai, June 28, 2026 The Indian stock market ended the holiday-shortened week on a positive note, with benchmark indices extending gains for a third session out of four and the Nifty holding firmly above the key 24,000 mark. Analysts said the near-term technical outlook remains constructive, although fresh buying will be needed for the next [...] The post Nifty faces resistance at 24,500, Sensex eyes 79,000 if rally sustains: Analysts appeared first on Yes Punjab News .
